negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_064
prompt: A young man in a bright green t-shirt stands outdoors in a residential driveway, surrounded by large Home Depot boxes stacked against a black ATV. The scene is set during the day under clear skies, with sunlight casting shadows across the area. The man gestures animatedly with his hands, seemingly explaining or demonstrating something related to the ATV or the boxes. The background includes a garage door on the left, some scattered leaves on the ground, and trees lining the property, indicating a suburban environment. Another person briefly appears behind the main subject, partially obscured but also engaged in the activity. The man in the green shirt continues to point and gesture towards the ATV and the boxes, maintaining his focus on the task at hand. The final frame shows the man still actively gesturing, with the ATV and the Home Depot boxes prominently displayed in the background, suggesting an ongoing discussion or demonstration.
